units.source_text: 1 代表策略交易對除稅前利潤的影響，包括須予注意項⽬影響和經營業績的扭曲影響。數字不代表每項已出售業務的除稅前利潤。對於逐步縮減的業務，確認營業⽀
units.translation_target_text: 1 Represents the impact of strategic transactions on pre-tax profits, including the impact of noteworthy items and the distorting impact of operating results. Figures do not represent pre-tax profits for each business sold. For businesses that are gradually reduced, confirm operating expenses
units.translation_en: 1 Represents the impact of strategic transactions on pre-tax profits, including the impact of noteworthy items and the distorting impact of operating results. Figures do not represent pre-tax profits for each business sold. For businesses that are gradually reduced, confirm operating expenses

units.source_text: 出影響與營業收入影響可能存在時間上的差異。倘⽀出⾏動的影響與營業收入因此受到的影響存在時間上的滯後，該等情況便會發⽣。
units.translation_target_text: There may be a time difference between the impact on output and the impact on operating income. This may occur if there is a time lag between the impact of expenditure actions and the resulting impact on operating income.
